nodes.label: AI as brainstorming partner for open-ended tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for precise, parameter-heavy tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use it quite a bit for brainstorming ideas

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for mundane tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as inefficient for precise formatting tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to outsource more mundane tasks

nodes.label: AI as enhancer of weak skills
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary for personally meaningful tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI has been more of a tool to help me enhance the areas where I was going to be weak anyway

nodes.label: AI use as behind-the-scenes activity
nodes.grounding_span: I try to keep it really behind the scenes

nodes.label: AI as buffer against disappointment
nodes.grounding_span: I would've been a lot more upset about this decision if I had spent significantly more time on my own

nodes.label: Time for hands-on work with children
nodes.grounding_span: AI as a way to be able to focus more on and have more energy for working directly with the children

nodes.label: Personal free time
nodes.grounding_span: get some free time back for my personal life

nodes.label: Professional competence and skill enhancement
nodes.grounding_span: AI to boost my skills in writing curriculum

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming and lesson creation
nodes.grounding_span: One time that AI made me feel particularly satisfied, was when I needed to create a series of lessons

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for precise scheduling
nodes.grounding_span: the AI just kept messing up the numbers

nodes.label: Wariness about using AI openly due to workplace polarization
nodes.grounding_span: I am a little wary about using it or recommending it

nodes.label: Hope for future automation of mundane tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I just hope that we can move beyond brainstorming... into more automation of tasks

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — takes AI suggestions as starting point and molds them
nodes.grounding_span: I take the ideas that are given to me and I mold them into something that is more precisely what I need

nodes.label: Selective disclosure — compartmentalizes AI use based on social context
nodes.grounding_span: I try to keep it really behind the scenes
